title: Planticulture
description:
Planticulture is a garden simulator-sandbox based around companion planting. 

You start out with a sunflower seed, a small patch of soil, and some tools. As you help your first plant grow, you'll learn how to make compost, expand your plot of soil, and manage its needs. After you grow your first plant, you can collect seeds, unlock new plants, and begin expanding your garden!

Take it easy and enjoy the relaxed atmosphere of Planticulture, going with the flow of the game's various cycles and letting things develop while you idle; or focus on efficiency and fast-forward to watch the time fly by- it's up to you. 

Use tools to tend to your plantsManage the water, fertility, and light of each plant, finding the right balance to meet their needs.

Use the properties of each plant to help your garden alongPlants have a range of things they can do- like attracting bees, warding off pests, and providing shade.

Fill out your journal by growing plants to maturityEach time you grow a new plant to maturity, you can take a photo as a keepsake- try to collect as many as you can!

See your garden come to life!Use seeds to unlock decorations, make the garden your own, and watch as it changes with the time of day and the weather. 

Features:• 15+ plants

• 5 critters to wander through the garden

• 20+ decorations

• An in-game guide

• Make compost with grass and plants

• Rain and day/night cycles

• Forgiving game play- no matter how bleak things get, you can always come back from it. Death is just part of the cycle

• Ongoing updates with new content and features planned for after release
description_short: Planticulture is about using companion planting to grow your garden, collect plants, unlock decorations, and fill your journal. Play idle or active, chaotic or controlled, and make the space your own.
